domain_context: CinemaSync Watch Party - Real-time OTT synchronized viewing
vibe: Vintage movie-theater marquee meets modern live streaming overlay

hierarchy.h1: font-['Anton'] text-5xl sm:text-6xl uppercase tracking-wide leading-none
hierarchy.h2: font-['Anton'] text-3xl sm:text-4xl uppercase tracking-normal leading-tight

layout_modes.dashboard: Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6). Left col-span-8 for Rooms, Right col-span-4 for Friends/Profile.
layout_modes.watch_room: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4). Player col-span-3 h-full, Chat col-span-1 h-[80vh] border-l border-white/10.

unique_id_badge.description: Styled like a vintage movie ticket stub
unique_id_badge.classes: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 bg-[#E5A93C]/10 border border-dashed border-[#E5A93C]/50 text-[#E5A93C] font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] text-sm tracking-widest rounded-sm cursor-copy hover:bg-[#E5A93C]/20 transition-colors

room_card.description: Cinematic dark card with marquee hover effect
room_card.classes: bg-[#141211] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#E5A93C] p-6 rounded-sm group relative overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(229,169,60,0.15)] flex flex-col justify-between h-full
room_card.inner_elements: Use Anton for the room title, IBM Plex Mono for the participant count.

chat_bubble.description: Subtitles style, avoiding generic iOS bubbles
chat_bubble.classes_host: bg-transparent border-l-2 border-[#E5A93C] pl-3 py-1 mb-4 flex flex-col gap-1
chat_bubble.classes_guest: bg-transparent border-l-2 border-[#5C5A56] pl-3 py-1 mb-4 flex flex-col gap-1

sync_control_bar.description: Floating glassmorphism control panel over the video player
sync_control_bar.classes: absolute bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-[#0A0908]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 px-6 py-3 flex gap-6 items-center rounded-sm shadow-2xl

platform_launcher_tile.description: Dark, desaturated squares that light up in brand colors on hover
platform_launcher_tile.classes: bg-[#141211] aspect-video border border-white/5 hover:border-white/20 flex items-center justify-center grayscale opacity-70 hover:grayscale-0 hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-500 rounded-sm group relative

participant_avatar.description: Sharp squares, no circles. Feels like film frames.
participant_avatar.classes: w-10 h-10 rounded-none object-cover grayscale-[50%] hover:grayscale-0 border border-white/10 transition-all

friend_request_pill.classes: flex items-center justify-between p-3 border border-white/10 bg-[#1E1C1A] rounded-sm font-['Manrope'] text-sm

buttons.primary: bg-[#E5A93C] text-[#0A0908] font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] tracking-widest uppercase px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#F0B955] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(229,169,60,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#F7F7F2] border border-white/20 font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] tracking-widest uppercase px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:border-white/50 transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-transparent text-[#FF3B00] border border-[#FF3B00]/30 font-['IBM_Plex_Mono'] tracking-widest uppercase px-6 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#FF3B00]/10 hover:border-[#FF3B00] transition-all

hero_background.description: Vintage cinema marquee for landing page hero overlay. Overlay with bg-black/60 to keep text readable.

watch_party_context.description: Friends in a dark room watching TV. Use in feature sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: FONTS: Import 'Anton', 'Manrope', and 'IBM Plex Mono' from Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
TESTING: Every clickable element (buttons, tabs, room cards, friend actions) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='join-room-submit-button').
THEME: This is a strictly Dark Mode application. Do not implement a light mode toggle. The Void background (#0A0908) is mandatory.

UI COMPONENTS: Use HTML/Tailwind over generic Shadcn cards to maintain the 'sharp edge / marquee' aesthetic. Do not use border-radius larger than rounded-md. Most things should be rounded-sm or rounded-none.
CHAT BUBBLES: Do not use iOS-style chat bubbles. Use the left-border 'subtitle' style defined in components.chat_bubble.
FORMS & INPUTS: Use Shadcn Input/Form logic but override classes to remove rings. Focus state should be a solid 1px border of #E5A93C, background #141211.
AVATARS: Avatars must be square with no border radius (or extremely slight rounded-sm), to mimic film frames.
OTT LOGOS: For platforms like Amazon Prime, Hoichoi, ZEE5, use simple text logos (IBM Plex Mono) or SVG icons rather than large images. Keep them desaturated by default.
